data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for parallel signature routing (Party A and B simultaneously, then C). However, the provided evidence only confirms a sequential routing process, as detailed in the linked use case, which describes a clear order of signatures without any indication of simultaneous signing. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for parallel routing, as it does not fulfill the specified need.
gaps: No evidence of parallel signature routing among parties.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
